name: Gold Bull Resources Corp.
description: Gold Bull Resources Corp. is a Canadian junior gold exploration company focused on acquiring and developing gold projects in the United States. The company's flagship asset is the Sandman Gold Project, located in the mining-friendly jurisdiction of Nevada, which hosts an established gold resource. Gold Bull is committed to expanding its resource base through systematic exploration and drilling, leveraging an experienced management team with a track record of discovery and development in the resource sector.
